## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and the technical approach.

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Manual flow tested when relevant

## Impact

- [ ] No env var changes
- [ ] No database migration changes
- [ ] No security-sensitive behavior changes

If any box above is not true, explain here.

## Screenshots

Include screenshots or short recordings for UI changes in `src/app` or `src/components`.

## Notes

Anything reviewers should watch for: edge cases, follow-ups, deployment caveats, or tradeoffs.
